_comment: CCI ref/encl warning fixture: Proper citations but contains enclosure under separate cover notation, plus a vague reference entry.
encl: (1) Annual Training Schedule for Fiscal Year 2026
(2) Administrative Action Review Checklist (under separate cover)
body: 1. Per reference (a), SECNAV Manual 5216.5 Correspondence Manual, all units shall comply with established correspondence standards.
2. Per reference (b), Change One, administrative procedures must be reviewed annually.
3. Enclosure (1), Annual Training Schedule for Fiscal Year 2026, provides the training schedule for all departments.
4. Enclosure (2), Administrative Action Review Checklist (under separate cover), is provided under separate cover for your review.
